summary: Have an MLB account Log In - Successful login
description:
GIVEN the user launches the app without saved data
AND selects the [Have an MLB account?] button on the Startup screen

steps.action:
WHEN the Log In screen is displayed
AND a user enters an existing MLB.TV subscriber email address in the "Email Address" field
AND a user enters the existing subscriber password in the "Password" field
AND a user selects the [Log In] button
steps.result:
THEN the user is logged in successfully
AND the user is navigated to the Home page
